# Interface Contracts: Kiln Rebrand, Infrastructure & QA Reliability

**Purpose**: Define exact file modifications, new file structures, and skill interfaces so implementation tasks produce correct and compatible changes. This file is the single source of truth for what each file must contain after modification.

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan` (Phase 1: Design & Contracts)
**Consumed by**: `/speckit.implement` (all tasks must match these contracts)

## Rules

- Every file modification MUST match the contract defined here
- New files MUST follow the exact structure specified
- If a contract needs to change during implementation, update this file FIRST
- Skill SKILL.md modifications are instruction text — contracts define the required sections/content

---

## Module: Plugin Identity (FR-001, FR-002)

### plugin/package.json

```json
// FR-001: npm package name
{
  "name": "@yoshisada/kiln",
  "bin": {
    "kiln": "./bin/init.mjs"
  },
  "keywords": ["claude-code", "plugin", "kiln", "spec-first", "prd"]
}
```

### plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json

```json
// FR-002: plugin manifest name
{
  "name": "kiln",
  "description": "Spec-first development harness for Claude Code. Provides skills, agents, hooks, and templates for PRD-driven development with 4-gate enforcement."
}
```

## Module: Init Script (FR-006, FR-009)

### plugin/bin/init.mjs

```javascript
// FR-006: Update branding in scaffoldProject()
function scaffoldProject() {
  // Banner must say "kiln" not "speckit-harness"
  console.log("│  kiln — init              │");
  // ... all log messages reference "kiln"
}

// FR-006: Update branding in syncShared()
function syncShared() {
  console.log("│  kiln — update            │");
  // ... reference "kiln plugin"
}

// FR-006: Update branding in verify()
function verify() {
  log("✓ kiln plugin (installed)");
  console.log("  2. Run /kiln:build-prd to start building");
}

// FR-009: Add .kiln/ directory scaffolding in scaffoldProject()
// Must be idempotent — ensureDir() handles this
function scaffoldKilnDirectory() {
  const kilnDirs = [
    ".kiln/workflows",
    ".kiln/agents",
    ".kiln/issues",
    ".kiln/qa",
    ".kiln/logs"
  ];
  for (const dir of kilnDirs) {
    ensureDir(join(PROJECT_DIR, dir));
    log(`+ ${dir}/`);
  }
}
```

## Module: Doctor Manifest (FR-016)

### plugin/templates/kiln-manifest.json

```json
{
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Expected project structure for kiln-managed projects",
  "directories": {
    ".kiln": { "required": true, "tracked": true },
    ".kiln/workflows": { "required": true, "tracked": true },
    ".kiln/agents": { "required": true, "tracked": false },
    ".kiln/issues": { "required": true, "tracked": true },
    ".kiln/qa": { "required": true, "tracked": false },
    ".kiln/logs": { "required": true, "tracked": false }
  },
  "migrations": {
    "docs/backlog/": ".kiln/issues/",
    "qa-results/": ".kiln/qa/"
  }
}
```

---

## Module: Kiln Doctor Skill (FR-017, FR-018, FR-019, FR-020)

### plugin/skills/kiln-doctor/SKILL.md

The skill MUST include these sections:

```text
1. Read manifest from plugin/templates/kiln-manifest.json
2. Diagnose mode (default):
   - Check each directory in manifest.directories exists
   - Check each legacy path in manifest.migrations for files
   - Report findings as a list: MISSING, LEGACY, OK
3. Fix mode (--fix flag or user confirms):
   - For missing directories: create them
   - For legacy paths with files: move files to new location
   - Each fix must be presented before applying
   - All operations must be idempotent
4. Report summary of actions taken
```

---

## Module: QA Version Pre-flight (FR-021, FR-022, FR-023, FR-024)

### plugin/agents/qa-engineer.md — New Section

```markdown
## Pre-Flight: Build Version Verification

Before ANY testing or evaluation:

1. Read the VERSION file from the project root
2. Check the running application for a version indicator:
   - Look for version in page footer, about page, or meta tags
   - If no UI version: check CLI --version output, or build manifest
   - If no version found anywhere: check git log for latest commit SHA
3. Compare VERSION file value against app version
4. If versions match: proceed with testing
5. If versions mismatch:
   - Run the project's build command (npm run build, or equivalent)
   - Wait for build to complete
   - Re-check version
6. If still mismatched after rebuild:
   - Send warning to team lead via SendMessage
   - Add disclaimer to QA report: "WARNING: Build version mismatch detected. Findings may reflect stale code."
   - Proceed with testing
```

### plugin/skills/qa-pass/SKILL.md — Add Pre-flight Section

```markdown
## Pre-Flight: Version Verification
[Same version check logic as qa-engineer agent above]
Run this before dispatching any QA agents.
```

### plugin/skills/ux-evaluate/SKILL.md — Add Pre-flight Section

```markdown
## Pre-Flight: Version Verification
[Same version check logic as qa-engineer agent above]
Run this before starting evaluation.
```

## Module: Artifact Routing (FR-010, FR-011, FR-012, FR-013)

### Skill SKILL.md Updates — Output Path Changes

```text
// FR-011: plugin/skills/report-issue/SKILL.md
Old: docs/backlog/
New: .kiln/issues/

// FR-012: plugin/skills/qa-pass/SKILL.md
Old: qa-results/ (or inline)
New: .kiln/qa/

// FR-012: plugin/skills/qa-checkpoint/SKILL.md
Old: qa-results/
New: .kiln/qa/

// FR-012: plugin/skills/qa-final/SKILL.md
Old: qa-results/
New: .kiln/qa/

// FR-013: plugin/skills/build-prd/SKILL.md
Old: (inline logs)
New: .kiln/logs/

// FR-010: Agent output routing
Agent run artifacts -> .kiln/agents/{run-id}/
```

## Module: Workflow Format (FR-015)

### plugin/templates/workflow-format.md

```markdown
# Workflow Format Specification

Workflows are markdown files stored in .kiln/workflows/.

## File Structure

- Filename: {workflow-name}.md
- Location: .kiln/workflows/

## Required Sections

- Name: Human-readable workflow name
- Trigger: When this workflow should run (manual, on-commit, on-pr)
- Steps: Ordered list of actions (skill invocations, shell commands)
- Inputs: Required inputs and their types
- Outputs: Expected outputs and their locations
```

---

## Module: Documentation Updates (FR-005, FR-007)

### CLAUDE.md

All occurrences of "speckit-harness" replaced with "kiln". All `/speckit-harness:*` command references updated to `/kiln:*`. All `speckit-*` skill names updated to drop the prefix.

### plugin/scaffold/CLAUDE.md

Same updates as root CLAUDE.md — this is the template copied to consumer projects.

### FR-007: Deprecation Notice

Add to CLAUDE.md and README:
```markdown
> **Migration Notice**: This plugin was renamed from `speckit-harness` to `kiln`.
> Old skill names (`/speckit-harness:speckit-*`) are no longer available.
> Use the new names: `/kiln:specify`, `/kiln:plan`, `/kiln:tasks`, etc.
```
